productDisplayName: Nike Men Crickt Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Team India track pants in blue made of 100% Dri-Fit polyester, has an elastic waist band with drawstrings on the inside, fluorescent panel on either sides of the legs with an embroidered swoosh on the thigh, and reinforced stitches on tear points and crotch area Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Do not use softeners or bleach Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not line dry Do not dry clean Do not iron Here is your chance to bleed blue for the men in Blue. Wear these Nike track pants made with special care and efficient fabric management technologies like Dri-Fit polyester, and achieve optimum performance when you take to the field.
